plugins.name: Upbit Official
plugins.description: Upbit Official API — Real-time crypto trading
plugins.description_long: Official API plugin for Upbit, Korea's largest cryptocurrency exchange. Supports real-time price quotes, market/limit orders, portfolio tracking, and full symbol scanning. Fully compatible with the auto-trading engine. Built on the pyupbit library for stable and reliable integration.
how_it_works: Get your API Key from your Upbit account (Open API management page)
Enter your API Key and Secret Key in the Store
Verify the connection with Test Connection
Activate and start trading via chatbot or auto-trading engine
plugins.auth_note: API Keys are encrypted and stored using Windows Credential Manager. Never stored in plain text.

plugins.name: Alpaca Markets
plugins.description: Alpaca Markets — US Stock & Crypto Trading
plugins.description_long: Official plugin for Alpaca, a commission-free US stock and crypto trading platform. Supports 8 markets including S&P 500, NASDAQ, NYSE, and crypto. Test strategies safely with Paper Trading mode. Features WebSocket real-time quotes and fractional shares support.
how_it_works: Create an Alpaca account and get your API Key (Paper or Live)
Enter your API Key and Secret Key in the Store
Verify the connection with Test Connection
Select markets to scan in Strategy Editor and start auto-trading
plugins.auth_note: Paper Trading keys are provided by default for risk-free testing. Keys are encrypted and stored securely.

plugins.name: Kalshi (CDP)
plugins.description: Kalshi prediction market — CFTC-regulated, browser automation (CDP)
plugins.description_long: Kalshi prediction market exchange via CDP (Chrome browser automation). Browse markets, view orderbook, place limit/market orders. CFTC-regulated. No API key needed — just log in.
how_it_works: Launch Chrome with remote debugging enabled
Log in to your Kalshi account in the browser
Activate this plugin — it connects via CDP automatically
plugins.auth_note: No credentials stored. Your login session stays in your browser. SandClaw never sees your password.

plugins.name: Robinhood
plugins.description: Robinhood — Commission-free stock & crypto trading via browser
plugins.description_long: Commission-free stock, crypto, and prediction market trading via Chrome browser automation. SandClaw connects to your Robinhood session through CDP — no API keys needed, just log in to your account. Supports stocks, fractional shares, crypto, and event contracts.
how_it_works: Launch Chrome with remote debugging enabled
Log in to your Robinhood account in the browser
Activate this plugin — it connects via CDP automatically
plugins.auth_note: No credentials stored. Your login session stays in your browser. SandClaw never sees your password.

plugins.name: Web Search (DuckDuckGo)
plugins.description: DuckDuckGo-based real-time web search — No API key required
plugins.description_long: Real-time web search plugin powered by DuckDuckGo. No API key required — works instantly. Search for the latest news, market data, and company information through the chatbot. Uses the privacy-respecting DuckDuckGo search engine.
how_it_works: Activate with no additional setup required
Ask the chatbot to search — e.g., 'search for...', 'find latest news about...'
Search results are included directly in the chatbot response
plugins.auth_note: No API key required. Uses DuckDuckGo's public search API.

plugins.name: LS Securities
plugins.description: LS Securities (LS증권) Open API — Korean stock price, chart, account balance, buy/sell orders via OAuth2 REST API
plugins.description_long: LS증권 Open API를 활용한 한국 주식 트레이딩 플러그인. KOSPI, KOSDAQ, ETF, ELW 현물 거래를 지원합니다. 13개 마켓 (7개 지수 + 6개 동적순위), WebSocket 실시간 시세, t8407 배치 조회, 마진 거래(융자매수)를 지원합니다.
how_it_works: LS증권 Open API에서 App Key와 App Secret Key를 발급받으세요
Store에서 키를 입력하면 OAuth2 Bearer 토큰을 자동 발급합니다
챗봇에서 '삼성전자 현재가' 등의 명령으로 실시간 시세를 조회하세요
자동매매 엔진에서 13개 마켓을 활용한 전략을 실행할 수 있습니다
plugins.auth_note: LS증권 Open API 포털에서 App Key를 발급받으세요. 키는 Windows Credential Manager에 암호화 저장됩니다.

plugins.name: LS Securities Futures
plugins.description: LS증권 선물/옵션 트레이딩 — KOSPI200 선물, 옵션, 주식선물, 상품선물, 미니선물
plugins.description_long: LS증권 국내 선물/옵션 시장 트레이딩 플러그인. KOSPI200 선물/옵션, 주식선물, 상품선물(금, 돈육 등), 미니KOSPI 선물을 지원합니다. LS Securities 플러그인의 인증을 공유합니다.
how_it_works: 먼저 LS Securities (Base) 플러그인을 설치하고 인증하세요
이 Extension은 Base의 인증을 자동 상속합니다
선물/옵션 현재가, 차트, 계좌, 주문 기능을 사용할 수 있습니다
plugins.auth_note: LS Securities (Base) 플러그인이 설치되어 있어야 합니다. 인증은 Base에서 관리됩니다.

plugins.name: LS Securities Overseas
plugins.description: LS증권 해외주식 트레이딩 — 미국 NYSE/AMEX, NASDAQ
plugins.description_long: LS증권 해외주식 트레이딩 플러그인. 미국 NYSE, AMEX, NASDAQ 주식을 지원합니다. LS Securities 플러그인의 인증을 공유합니다.
how_it_works: 먼저 LS Securities (Base) 플러그인을 설치하고 인증하세요
이 Extension은 Base의 인증을 자동 상속합니다
해외주식 현재가, 차트, 계좌, 주문 기능을 사용할 수 있습니다
plugins.auth_note: LS Securities (Base) 플러그인이 설치되어 있어야 합니다. 인증은 Base에서 관리됩니다.

plugins.name: LS Securities Overseas Futures
plugins.description: LS증권 해외선물/옵션 트레이딩 — CME, EUREX, SGX 등 글로벌 파생상품
plugins.description_long: LS증권 해외선물/옵션 트레이딩 플러그인. CME(미국), EUREX(유럽), SGX(싱가포르) 등 글로벌 파생상품 시장을 지원합니다. LS Securities 플러그인의 인증을 공유합니다.
how_it_works: 먼저 LS Securities (Base) 플러그인을 설치하고 인증하세요
이 Extension은 Base의 인증을 자동 상속합니다
해외선물/옵션 현재가, 차트, 계좌, 주문 기능을 사용할 수 있습니다
plugins.auth_note: LS Securities (Base) 플러그인이 설치되어 있어야 합니다. 인증은 Base에서 관리됩니다.

plugins.name: LS Securities KRX Night Derivatives
plugins.description: LS증권 KRX야간파생 — 야간 KOSPI200선물/옵션, 미니선물/옵션, 코스닥150선물/옵션, 상품선물, 위클리옵션
plugins.description_long: LS증권 KRX 야간파생 시장 트레이딩 플러그인. 야간 KOSPI200 선물/옵션, 미니선물/옵션, 코스닥150 선물/옵션, 상품선물, 위클리옵션을 지원합니다. 거래 시간: 17:00~03:30 KST. LS Securities 플러그인의 인증을 공유합니다.
how_it_works: 먼저 LS Securities (Base) 플러그인을 설치하고 인증하세요
이 Extension은 Base의 인증을 자동 상속합니다
야간파생 현재가, 차트, 계좌, 주문 기능을 사용할 수 있습니다 (17:00~03:30 KST)
plugins.auth_note: LS Securities (Base) 플러그인이 설치되어 있어야 합니다. 인증은 Base에서 관리됩니다.

plugins.name: Web Browsing (CDP)
plugins.description: General-purpose web browsing via CDP browser automation
plugins.description_long: General-purpose web browsing via CDP (Chrome browser automation). Browse any website, extract information, monitor pages. No API key needed — uses your real Chrome browser. Detects CAPTCHA/security challenges and pauses for user intervention.
how_it_works: Launch Chrome with remote debugging enabled
Activate this plugin in the Store
Use the chatbot to browse any website
CAPTCHA pages are detected automatically — solve in browser and retry
plugins.auth_note: No credentials needed. Uses your existing Chrome browser session.

plugins.name: SBI Securities (SBI証券)
plugins.description: SBI Securities — Japan's #1 broker via CDP (no API available)
plugins.description_long: SBI Securities (SBI証券) trading via CDP browser automation. Japan's largest online broker with 15M+ accounts. Supports Japanese stocks, US stocks, ETFs, futures and options. No API available — CDP is the only automation method. Full CDP scraping with login detection, balance/portfolio/quote retrieval, and 2-phase Safety Intercept order execution.
how_it_works: Launch Chrome with remote debugging enabled (port 9225)
Log in to your SBI Securities account in the browser
Activate this plugin — it connects via CDP automatically
Orders use 2-phase Safety Intercept: preview screenshot → user confirm → execute
plugins.auth_note: No credentials stored. Your login session stays in your browser. SandClaw never sees your password.

plugins.name: Rakuten Securities (楽天証券)
plugins.description: Rakuten Securities — Japan's #1 by accounts via CDP (no API available)
plugins.description_long: Rakuten Securities (楽天証券) trading via CDP browser automation. Japan's largest broker by account count with 13M+ accounts. Supports Japanese stocks, US stocks, ETFs, futures and options. No API available — CDP is the only automation method.
how_it_works: Launch Chrome with remote debugging enabled (port 9226)
Log in to your Rakuten Securities account in the browser
Activate this plugin — it connects via CDP automatically
plugins.auth_note: No credentials stored. Your login session stays in your browser. SandClaw never sees your password.

plugins.name: kabu STATION
plugins.description: kabu STATION API — 日本株の現在値・口座残高・売買注文
plugins.description_long: 三菱UFJ eスマート証券のkabu STATION APIを活用した日本株トレーディングプラグイン。東証プライム・スタンダード・グロース全銘柄、ETF対応。WebSocketリアルタイム、ランキング、自動売買エンジン対応。
how_it_works: kabu STATIONアプリを起動してAPI設定でパスワードを設定
StoreでAPIパスワードと取引パスワードを入力
チャットで「トヨタ 現在値」等で即時利用可能
plugins.auth_note: kabu STATIONデスクトップアプリがPCで起動中であることが必要です。パスワードはWindows Credential Managerに暗号化保存されます。
plugins.restriction_notice:
kabu STATION API の利用規約により、Store からの自動インストールはできません。

手動でダウンロードして ~/.sandclaw/plugins/ に配置すれば利用可能です。

※ kabucom からテスト環境の提供を受けられなかったため、実環境での十分なテストが行えていません。不具合がありましたら GitHub Issue でご報告ください — フィードバックに基づいてアップデートを提供いたします。

plugins.name: bitFlyer Lightning
plugins.description: bitFlyer Lightning — 日本最大の暗号資産取引所。現物取引とCFD取引をサポート。
plugins.description_long: bitFlyer Lightningは日本最大の暗号資産取引所のトレーディングプラグインです。BTC/JPY、ETH/JPY等の現物取引とFX_BTC_JPYのCFD取引に対応。WebSocketリアルタイム更新、自動売買エンジン対応。
how_it_works: bitFlyerでアカウントを作成し、API Keyを発行
StoreでAPI KeyとAPI Secretを入力
チャットで「BTC現在値」等で即時利用可能
plugins.auth_note: API KeyとAPI SecretはWindows Credential Managerに暗号化保存されます。

plugins.name: Kalshi (API)
plugins.description: Kalshi Prediction Market — CFTC-regulated YES/NO contract trading via REST API
plugins.description_long: Official REST API plugin for Kalshi, the #1 CFTC-regulated prediction market exchange in the US. Trade on event outcomes across 16 categories including Crypto, Politics, Sports, Economics, and more. Supports 38 tools for market discovery, orderbook viewing, limit/market orders, portfolio tracking, and WebSocket real-time data. RSA-PSS authentication with encrypted key storage.
how_it_works: Get your API Key ID and RSA Private Key from kalshi.com/account/api-keys
Enter your credentials in the Credential Vault
Test Connection to verify API access
Use the chatbot to explore markets and place orders — no strategy code needed
plugins.auth_note: RSA Private Key is encrypted and stored using Windows Credential Manager. Dual persistence (Keyring + encrypted file). Never transmitted in plain text.

plugins.name: 한국투자증권
plugins.description: 한국투자증권 Open API — 국내주식 시세, 차트, 호가, 계좌잔고, 매수/매도 주문 (OAuth2 REST + WebSocket)
plugins.description_long: 한국투자증권 Open API를 활용한 국내주식 트레이딩 플러그인. KOSPI, KOSDAQ, ETF 현물 거래를 지원합니다. 17개 마켓 (지수 7개 + 동적순위 6개 + 마진레벨 3개 + 전종목), WebSocket 실시간 시세, 마진 거래, 자동매매 엔진을 지원합니다.
how_it_works: 한국투자증권 KIS Developers에서 App Key와 App Secret Key를 발급받으세요
Store에서 App Key, App Secret, 계좌번호를 입력하면 OAuth2 Bearer 토큰을 자동 발급합니다
챗봇에서 '삼성전자 현재가' 등의 명령으로 실시간 시세를 조회하세요
자동매매 엔진에서 17개 마켓을 활용한 전략을 실행할 수 있습니다
plugins.auth_note: 한국투자증권 KIS Developers에서 App Key를 발급받으세요. 키는 Windows Credential Manager에 암호화 저장됩니다.

plugins.name: Angel One (SmartAPI)
plugins.description: Angel One SmartAPI — NSE/BSE equities, F&O, MCX commodities, CDS via SmartAPI v1
plugins.description_long:
Trade Indian stocks, futures, options, commodities, and currencies on NSE/BSE/NFO/MCX/CDS via Angel One SmartAPI. Uses TOTP-based automated authentication for fully headless login. API is completely free (trading + market data + historical). 19 markets including NIFTY50, Bank NIFTY, MCX Gold/Crude.

⚠️ Community Testing Notice: The developer does not have an Indian trading account, so this plugin has NOT been tested with real market data. The code follows official SmartAPI documentation and is theoretically correct. If you encounter any issues, please report them on GitHub — we welcome feedback from Indian users to improve this plugin!
how_it_works: Create an Angel One trading account at angelone.com
Register on SmartAPI Developer Portal and generate an API Key
Enable TOTP on your account and save the QR secret key
In SandClaw, enter your API Key, Client Code, Trading PIN, and TOTP Secret
Click 'TEST CONNECTION' — the plugin auto-generates TOTP and logs in via JWT
plugins.auth_note: Fully automated login using TOTP (pyotp). No browser redirect needed. Session expires daily at midnight IST; auto-refreshed via JWT refresh token.

plugins.name: Upstox
plugins.description: Upstox India broker — NSE/BSE equities, F&O, MCX, NCD via Upstox API v2/v3
plugins.description_long:
Trade Indian stocks, futures, options, commodities, and currencies on NSE/BSE/NFO/MCX/NCD via Upstox API v2/v3. Uses OAuth 2.0 authentication with browser redirect. API is completely free. Sandbox environment available for testing. Orders use the dedicated high-frequency endpoint for low-latency execution. 17 markets including NIFTY50, Bank NIFTY, MCX Gold/Crude.

⚠️ Community Testing Notice: The developer does not have an Indian trading account, so this plugin has NOT been tested with real market data. The code follows official Upstox API documentation and is theoretically correct. If you encounter any issues, please report them on GitHub — we welcome feedback from Indian users to improve this plugin!
how_it_works: Create an Upstox trading account at upstox.com
Go to Account > My Apps and create an app with redirect URI http://localhost:18085/callback
Copy the API Key (Client ID) and API Secret (Client Secret)
In SandClaw, enter your API Key, API Secret, and Redirect URI
Click 'TEST CONNECTION' — authorize via browser redirect to complete OAuth
plugins.auth_note: OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code flow. Access tokens are valid for one trading day. Re-authorize each morning if needed.

plugins.name: Zerodha (Kite Connect)
plugins.description: Zerodha India broker — NSE/BSE/NFO/MCX/CDS via Kite Connect API v3
plugins.description_long:
Trade Indian stocks, futures, options, commodities, currencies, and mutual funds on NSE/BSE/NFO/MCX/CDS via Zerodha's Kite Connect API v3. Uses an OAuth-like authentication flow with SHA-256 checksum verification. Personal API access is free; market data subscription costs 500 INR/month (~$6). Binary WebSocket supports up to 3,000 instruments per connection. 20 markets including NIFTY50, Bank NIFTY, Midcap, MCX Gold/Crude.

⚠️ Community Testing Notice: The developer does not have an Indian trading account, so this plugin has NOT been tested with real market data. The code follows official Kite Connect API documentation and is theoretically correct. If you encounter any issues, please report them on GitHub — we welcome feedback from Indian users to improve this plugin!
how_it_works: Create a Zerodha trading account at zerodha.com
Register on Kite Connect Developer Portal (developers.kite.trade) and create an app
Copy your API Key and API Secret from the developer portal
In SandClaw, enter your API Key and API Secret
Log in via Zerodha's Kite login page — copy the request_token from the redirect URL
Paste the request_token in SandClaw and click 'TEST CONNECTION'
plugins.auth_note: OAuth-like flow with SHA-256 checksum verification. Access tokens expire daily at 6:00 AM IST — you must re-login via Kite redirect each trading day.

plugins.name: Kraken (Base)
plugins.description: Kraken crypto exchange — 300+ coins, low fees, Spot trading via REST + WebSocket v2
plugins.description_long: Official REST API plugin for Kraken, a top-tier US cryptocurrency exchange. Trade 300+ coins with low fees across 5 spot markets (USD, EUR, stablecoins, crypto pairs). Features WebSocket v2 real-time streaming, orderbook depth, market scanning, and full order management. HMAC-SHA512 authentication with encrypted key storage.
how_it_works: Generate API key at kraken.com/u/security/api
Enter API Key and API Secret in Credential Vault
Plugin connects via REST + WebSocket v2
Trade spot crypto with market/limit orders
plugins.auth_note: API keys stored locally with AES-256 encryption via Windows Credential Manager. Never transmitted in plain text.

plugins.name: Kraken Futures
plugins.description: Kraken Futures — Crypto perpetuals & fixed-maturity contracts via REST + WebSocket
plugins.description_long: Extension plugin for Kraken Futures trading. Supports perpetual contracts (PF_XBTUSD), fixed-maturity futures, leverage up to 50x, and real-time WebSocket feeds. Uses separate API endpoint (futures.kraken.com) with sandbox environment available for testing. Requires Kraken (Base) plugin installed.
how_it_works: Install Kraken (Base) plugin first and enter API credentials
Install this Futures extension from the Store
Futures markets will appear in Strategy Editor dropdown
Sandbox mode available for paper trading
plugins.auth_note: Shares API credentials with Kraken (Base) plugin. No additional authentication required.

plugins.name: Kraken xStocks
plugins.description: Kraken xStocks — Tokenized US equities (AAPL, TSLA, MSFT...) via Spot API
plugins.description_long: Extension plugin for Kraken xStocks tokenized equity trading. Trade ~70+ tokenized US stocks (AAPLxUSD, TSLAxUSD, etc.) using the same Spot API with asset_class parameter. Supports 24/5 trading, fractional shares, and real-time WebSocket updates. Requires Kraken (Base) plugin installed.
how_it_works: Install Kraken (Base) plugin first and enter API credentials
Install this xStocks extension from the Store
xStocks markets will appear in Strategy Editor dropdown
Trade tokenized stocks like AAPLxUSD alongside crypto
plugins.auth_note: Shares API credentials with Kraken (Base) plugin. Uses asset_class='tokenized_asset' parameter.
plugins.region_notice: xStocks (tokenized equities) may not be available in all jurisdictions. Check Kraken's supported regions for xStocks trading at kraken.com before installing.

plugins.name: Kraken Equities
plugins.description: Kraken Equities — 11,000+ US stocks & ETFs (API not yet available)
plugins.description_long: Placeholder for Kraken traditional equities trading. Kraken Securities (FINRA member) offers 11,000+ commission-free US stocks and ETFs, but currently only through Kraken Desktop app — no public trading API is available yet.
how_it_works: This plugin cannot be installed — Kraken does not provide a public API for traditional equity trading
Kraken Equities is currently available only through the Kraken Desktop application
When Kraken releases a public equities trading API, this plugin will be updated
plugins.auth_note: No API access available at this time.
plugins.restriction_notice:
Kraken Equities does not provide a public trading API.

Kraken Securities LLC (FINRA member) offers 11,000+ commission-free US stocks & ETFs, but only through the Kraken Desktop application. Programmatic API access is not available.

Kraken is preparing for an IPO in 2026 — a public equities API may become available in the future.

When the API is released, this plugin will be updated to support full trading functionality.

plugins.name: Interactive Brokers
plugins.description: Interactive Brokers (IBKR) — Global stock trading via Client Portal REST API. Supports 150+ markets across 33 countries.
plugins.description_long: Interactive Brokers (IBKR) is one of the world's largest electronic brokers, providing access to 150+ markets across 33 countries. IBKR does not use traditional API keys. Instead, IBKR provides a 'Client Portal Gateway' — a small Java program that runs locally on your computer (default port: 5000, fixed by IBKR). You log in via your browser, and the plugin communicates through this local Gateway. The Gateway must be running and logged in whenever you use this plugin.
how_it_works: Download and install Java Runtime (JRE 11+) if not already installed
Download 'Client Portal Gateway' from the IBKR website (Technology > API > Client Portal Gateway)
Extract the ZIP and run bin/run.bat (Windows) or bin/run.sh (Mac/Linux)
Open your browser to https://localhost:5000 and log in with your IBKR account
Come back to SandClaw and click 'TEST CONNECTION' — the plugin will auto-detect your account
The plugin sends a keep-alive ping every 55 seconds to maintain your session (max 24 hours)
plugins.auth_note: No API keys needed. The Gateway manages authentication via your browser login session. Session expires after 24 hours (IBKR server policy, resets at midnight) — simply re-login at localhost:5000 and click TEST CONNECTION.

plugins.name: IBKR Options
plugins.description: IBKR Options Extension — Options chain, Greeks, and options trading via Client Portal API
how_it_works: Install the Interactive Brokers (Base) plugin first
This Extension inherits authentication from Base automatically
Access options chains, Greeks, strategies, and order placement
plugins.auth_note: Interactive Brokers (Base) plugin must be installed. Authentication is managed by Base.

plugins.name: IBKR Futures
plugins.description: IBKR Futures Extension — Global futures trading (Index, Energy, Metals, Agri, Rates, FX)
how_it_works: Install the Interactive Brokers (Base) plugin first
This Extension inherits authentication from Base automatically
Access global futures markets, chains, quotes, and order placement
plugins.auth_note: Interactive Brokers (Base) plugin must be installed. Authentication is managed by Base.

plugins.name: IBKR Forex
plugins.description: IBKR Forex Extension — Currency pair trading (Major, Minor, Exotic)
how_it_works: Install the Interactive Brokers (Base) plugin first
This Extension inherits authentication from Base automatically
Access forex pairs, real-time rates, quotes, and order placement
plugins.auth_note: Interactive Brokers (Base) plugin must be installed. Authentication is managed by Base.

plugins.name: IBKR Bonds
plugins.description: IBKR Bonds Extension — Government, Corporate, and Municipal bond trading
how_it_works: Install the Interactive Brokers (Base) plugin first
This Extension inherits authentication from Base automatically
Access bond search, quotes, and order placement
plugins.auth_note: Interactive Brokers (Base) plugin must be installed. Authentication is managed by Base.

plugins.name: IBKR Event Contracts
plugins.description: IBKR Event Contracts Extension — Prediction market (Politics, Economics, Weather, Sports)
how_it_works: Install the Interactive Brokers (Base) plugin first
This Extension inherits authentication from Base automatically
Browse event categories, view contracts, and place YES/NO orders
plugins.auth_note: Interactive Brokers (Base) plugin must be installed. Authentication is managed by Base.
